metadata.command: PYTHONHASHSEED=0 uv run python scripts/_clean_sweep.py  # physical-filter + scan-cap + deterministic
metadata.profile_description: Reported contrast grid: strategy x panel-size x expertise x bias sensitivity with one corpus-size/prevalence baseline.

monotone_checks.prediction: larger panels reduce sampling variance but need not monotonically lower EIE under correlated bias

prediction_rationales.bias_direction: Larger bias spread should widen the ideological-minus-representative EIE contrast when other regime coordinates are held fixed.
prediction_rationales.expertise_direction: Higher mean expertise should lower representative-sortition EIE error when other regime coordinates are held fixed.
prediction_rationales.pre_post_boundary: EIE-minus-majority-vote is descriptive: MV is the supervised/oracle baseline and EIE is the no-answer-key NTQR recovery metric.
prediction_rationales.rep_vs_ideo_sign: Single-bloc ideological selection should not outperform a representative draw when ideological bias is the manipulated dependence source.
